output.title: Dinner Stuffed Bell Peppers Skillet

ingredient_amounts.name: chicken breast
ingredient_amounts.notes: Calculated for 2 portion(s): per-portion amount multiplied by requested portions.

ingredient_amounts.name: eggs
ingredient_amounts.notes: Calculated for 2 portion(s): per-portion amount multiplied by requested portions.

ingredient_amounts.name: cooked rice
ingredient_amounts.notes: Calculated for 2 portion(s): per-portion amount multiplied by requested portions.

ingredient_amounts.name: spinach
ingredient_amounts.notes: Calculated for 2 portion(s): per-portion amount multiplied by requested portions.

steps: Measure the ingredients: 240 g chicken breast, 2 eggs eggs, 150 g cooked rice, 160 g spinach for 2 portion(s).
Cut firm vegetables or proteins from chicken breast, eggs, cooked rice, spinach into 1 to 2 cm bite-size pieces so they cook evenly; leave delicate greens larger because they wilt quickly.
Heat a wide pan over medium heat for 2 minutes, then add 1 tablespoon oil per 4 portions.

Add chicken pieces first and keep the pieces in one even layer; cook on medium-high heat for 4 to 5 minutes per side for 1 to 2 cm pieces, or 7 to 8 minutes per side for whole thicker pieces. Chicken is ready when no pink remains in the center and the juices run clear.
Fold spinach or delicate greens in during the final 60 to 90 seconds only, then season with salt and pepper. Serve immediately or divide into 2 dinner portion(s).
output.food_waste_note: Uses chicken breast, eggs before they sit in the fridge too long.

output.title: Dinner Chicken Breast Bowl

ingredient_amounts.name: chicken breast
ingredient_amounts.notes: Calculated for 2 portion(s): per-portion amount multiplied by requested portions.

ingredient_amounts.name: eggs
ingredient_amounts.notes: Calculated for 2 portion(s): per-portion amount multiplied by requested portions.

ingredient_amounts.name: cooked rice
ingredient_amounts.notes: Calculated for 2 portion(s): per-portion amount multiplied by requested portions.

steps: Measure the bowl base: 240 g chicken breast, 2 eggs eggs, 150 g cooked rice.
Prep chicken breast first: slice thin if it is firm, chop bite-size if it is tender, or keep it whole only if it is already cooked.
Warm the cooked grain or beans in a covered pan with 2 tablespoons water for 4 to 6 minutes, stirring halfway; add tender vegetables at the end so they soften without collapsing.
Divide into 2 dinner portion(s), then finish each portion with a small splash of lemon juice or vinegar and black pepper.
output.food_waste_note: Turns small leftover portions into a fast meal instead of letting them expire.

details.reason_summary: Recipes are expected to respect meal type, time, portions, allergies, and ambiguous ingredient variants.

Fold spinach or delicate greens in during the final 60 to 90 seconds only, then season with salt and pepper. Serve immediately or divide into 2 dinner portion(s).
recipe_candidates.food_waste_note: Uses chicken breast, eggs before they sit in the fridge too long.

recipe_candidates.title: Dinner Chicken Breast Bowl

ingredient_amounts.name: chicken breast
ingredient_amounts.notes: Calculated for 2 portion(s): per-portion amount multiplied by requested portions.

ingredient_amounts.name: eggs
ingredient_amounts.notes: Calculated for 2 portion(s): per-portion amount multiplied by requested portions.

ingredient_amounts.name: cooked rice
ingredient_amounts.notes: Calculated for 2 portion(s): per-portion amount multiplied by requested portions.

steps: Measure the bowl base: 240 g chicken breast, 2 eggs eggs, 150 g cooked rice.
Prep chicken breast first: slice thin if it is firm, chop bite-size if it is tender, or keep it whole only if it is already cooked.
Warm the cooked grain or beans in a covered pan with 2 tablespoons water for 4 to 6 minutes, stirring halfway; add tender vegetables at the end so they soften without collapsing.
Divide into 2 dinner portion(s), then finish each portion with a small splash of lemon juice or vinegar and black pepper.
recipe_candidates.food_waste_note: Turns small leftover portions into a fast meal instead of letting them expire.

Fold spinach or delicate greens in during the final 60 to 90 seconds only, then season with salt and pepper. Serve immediately or divide into 4 meal prep portion(s).
candidate.food_waste_note: Uses chicken breast, eggs before they sit in the fridge too long.
